items.title: Prefer economical SVD in ML pipelines
items.avoid: Computing full m×m U and n×n V when only top-k factors are needed.
items.prefer: Use `full_matrices=False` or randomized/truncated SVD (`sklearn.utils.extmath.randomized_svd`) for large sparse or tall matrices.
items.why: Memory and time scale with keeping only what downstream models consume.
items.example: For 1M×10k sparse term-document matrix, randomized SVD with k=100 avoids materializing full decompositions.

items.title: Inspect the singular value spectrum
items.avoid: Choosing rank k without looking at the decay of σᵢ.
items.prefer: Plot log(σᵢ) or cumulative explained variance before fixing k.
items.why: A sharp elbow suggests natural rank; a slow decay warns that low-rank models will lose substantial energy.
items.example: If σ₁₀ is still 30% of σ₁, rank-5 truncation likely underfits; consider higher k or nonlinear methods.
